zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持低位窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕6.67附近运行，整体仍处于弱势整理阶段，短线多空均衡但偏空压力未消，趋势尚未出现明确反转信号。短期均线压制明显，上方动能有限，市场观望情绪较重缺乏突破驱动整体结构偏弱需谨慎等待方向选择确认信号为主操作空间

技术指标方面，MACD略呈正值但动能柱较弱，说明反弹力度有限；RSI暂无数据，无法判断超买超卖区间，短线以震荡信号为主，缺乏趋势延续性整体指标偏中性偏弱，短期缺乏放量配合需观察后续修复信号确认变化为主节奏阶段性

支撑位位于6.65及6.60区域，下方若失守可能延伸至6.50；上方阻力集中在6.70与6.75附近，突破需成交量配合，否则易形成假突破整体区间结构清晰但偏窄幅运行多空拉锯明显短期波动收敛等待方向

操作建议以区间交易为主，未突破前不宜追涨杀跌，可在6.65附近低吸，6.70上方逐步止盈，跌破6.60则需严格止损控制风险整体以震荡策略应对市场波动强调纪律性交易避免情绪操作控制仓位为主执行

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase around the 6.67 region after a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.24%. Price action remains compressed between 6.6743 and 6.6988, indicating very low volatility and indecision in the market. The broader short-term structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bearish tone, as upside momentum has stalled near recent highs while buyers continue to defend minor dips. Overall, the pair is range-bound with no clear breakout signal yet.

The 20-period simple moving average at 6.64967 acts as a short-term dynamic support, with price currently trading slightly above it, suggesting mild underlying strength. The MACD reading of 0.0283 indicates a weak but positive momentum bias, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend direction. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies on price behavior, which remains flat, implying equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

Immediate support is located near the SMA20 at 6.64967, with a secondary floor around 6.6400 and psychological support at 6.6000 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 6.7000, aligned with the recent session high of 6.6988. A sustained break above this zone could open the path toward 6.7500, where prior supply is likely to re-emerge. Price is currently trapped within this narrow corridor.

Given the current compression, a range-trading approach is favored. Traders may consider accumulating near the 6.65 support zone with tight risk controls, placing stops below 6.60 to guard against downside extension. Profit-taking can be considered near 6.70–6.75 resistance. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above 6.70 would signal renewed bullish momentum, while a breakdown below 6.64 would shift bias bearish, targeting deeper retracement levels.
